description: The first company to achieve orbit with a liquid-fueled rocket, SpaceX develops launch systems at dramatically-lower costs than any entity — government or private — in history.
Palantir’s ground-breaking software allows analysts to understand vast quantities of information.
Anduril brings together top technical talent to solve the most complex national security challenges.
Stripe makes it easy to perform online financial transactions, processing billions of dollars a year for thousands of businesses.
Facebook is the largest social network in the world.
Airbnb is a community marketplace of individuals listing, exploring, and booking property around the world.
Ramp is the only corporate card that automates accounting, lowers your bills, and earns 1.5% cashback.
Neuralink is developing ultra-high bandwidth brain-machine interfaces to connect humans and computers.
OpenAI is a research and deployment company whose mission is to create safe and powerful AI that benefits all of humanity.
Cognition is an applied AI lab focused on reasoning, and code is just the beginning.
Nubank, the leading fintech company in Latin America, is redesigning the credit card experience in Brazil to reduce complexity and empower people.
Trade Republic is a European platform for commission-free mobile investing.
Spotify provides users with a free, legal music library of more than 20 million tracks.
Rippling is the world’s first system of record for workforce data – allowing you to manage employees’ payroll, benefits, devices, apps, and more, all in one platform.
Affirm is reinventing credit to make it more honest and friendly, giving consumers the flexibility to buy now and pay later without any hidden fees or compounding interest.
Crusoe is empowering the AI revolution as the industry’s first vertically integrated AI infrastructure provider.
Polymarket is the world’s largest prediction market. On Polymarket, traders predict the outcome of future events and earn when they are right.
Lighter is building verifiable financial infrastructure for digital assets and beyond.
Figma is changing traditional design operations by simplifying the designer workflow, bringing key contributors into the process, and enabling companies to design products more efficiently.
Varda is making the worlds first space factories, bringing high-value materials that can only be fabricated in microgravity, back down to earth.
General Matter is fueling American power. America’s future is nuclear. We make its fuel.
Impulse Space is accelerating the future in space through efficient transportation anywhere.
Hadrian is reindustrializing America by building highly automated factories that supercharge both American workers and the defense industrial base.
Enter’s AI agents are transforming how Latin America’s leading enterprises manage and win lawsuits at scale.
ARQ opens the world’s strongest assets and markets to travelers, investors, and professionals.
PsiQuantum is using silicon photonics to build the world’s first useful quantum computer, applying existing semiconductor and photonics manufacturing processes.
Until is building the medical infrastructure to pause biological time: starting with organ-scale reversible cryopreservation, and methodically scaling to whole-body preservation.
DeepMind is the world leader in artificial intelligence research and its application for positive impact.
Scale is building infrastructure for the democratization and proliferation of AI technology.
Flock Safety is a public safety operating system that helps communities and law enforcement in thousands of cities work together to eliminate crime, protect privacy, and mitigate bias.
The Boring Company creates safe, fast-to-dig, and low-cost transportation, utility, and freight tunnels. The mission: solve traffic, enable rapid point-to-point transportation, and transform cities.
Oculus develops virtual reality platforms and products that let people experience anything, with anyone.
Persona offers trusted identity infrastructure that allows businesses to craft personalized and automated identity experiences so they can better understand and protect users.
BuildOps serves the unsung heroes of the trades by delivering an end-to-end scalable platform for commercial contractors that empowers owners to build enduring businesses.
Twilio enables phones, VoIP and messaging to be embedded into web, desktop and mobile software.
Credit Karma is a personal finance company focused on helping everyone make financial progress.
Netic’s AI-driven platform helps service enterprises boost revenue, engage customers, and scale growth with intelligent automation.
Monaco is an AI sales platform automating customer acquisition and revenue growth for startups.
Oscar is fixing and humanizing healthcare through the use of technology, design, and data.
Develops and manufactures bio-based chemicals for use in the agriculture, energy, water, personal care, and cleaning sectors.
Wave is building financial infrastructure for Sub-Saharan Africa. They offer a better, faster, radically cheaper mobile money platform for consumers and businesses.
Kavak is the leading marketplace for pre-owned cars in emerging markets.

Flexport is an international freight forwarder built around a modern technology stack. The company provides air freight, ocean freight and other vital supply chain services to high-growth brands around the world.
Curated wholesale marketplace that connects more than 100,000 independent retailers with thousands of the world’s best emerging and established brands.
Workrise is the leading workforce management solution for the skilled trades.
Our mission is to provide the lowest cost, most convenient, and most transparent access to capital.
Found provides an all-in-one banking solution for small businesses and the self-employed with integrated bookkeeping, taxes, and invoicing.
Cedar is a smarter payment platform for providers and patients.
Asana is a web and mobile application designed to enable teamwork without email.
Lyft’s friendly, affordable peer-to-peer ridesharing model is transforming modern transportation.
Wish is a platform for discovering, collecting, and sharing products with friends.
Postmates is transforming the way goods move around cities by enabling anyone to have anything delivered on-demand.
Tagomi is an electronic brokerage for digital assets, combining institutional-grade services with proven robust infrastructure that clients have come to expect in other institutional asset classes.
Sword Health provides clinical-grade digital physical therapy that outperforms in-person care.
The Athletic is a direct-to-consumer subscription service serving sports fans in North America.

Traba is building a world where the supply chain operates at peak efficiency. They connect industrial businesses with reliable workers to fill open shifts and empower both businesses and workers to reach their full productivity and potential.
Paxos is regulated blockchain infrastructure provider building enterprise solutions for an open, digital economy.

Nanotronics is a leading developer of optical inspection tools for the semiconductor industry, using both hardware and software to provide industrial-scale, high-throughput, super-resolution imaging systems.

ZocDoc is the tech company at the beginning of a better healthcare experience. With a mission to give power to the patient, ZocDoc’s online marketplace delivers the accessible, seamless, and simple experience patients expect and deserve.
Mnzil is redefining workforce living through technology, creating smarter, more comfortable, and more productive environments for workers and the companies that rely on them.
EnduroSat is transforming the complex satellite industry into a streamlined data service.

Nominal modernizes the data supply chain for testing and operations across aerospace, defense, robotics, energy, and advanced manufacturing — helping hardware organizations operate at the speed of software development.
